name: emerge/architecture-methodology
summary: Enforces a 4-phase architecture design workflow by reading `.arch/state.json` on every request to gate responses by phase. Phase 1 extracts and validates requirements from PRDs; Phase 2 selects architecture patterns and establishes high-level structure; Phase 3 designs and accepts components sequentially; Phase 4 finalises and documents the solution. Use when discussing system design, solution architecture, PRD analysis, component design, technology selection, or architecture patterns — distinct from general coding help by its strict phase-gating, anti-pattern detection, and state-tracked component acceptance.
